stemHtml:
Given the following information, what will be the distance covered from the end of runway to the point at which 1500 ft will be reached above reference zero?

Performance Class: B
Cloud base above reference zero: 300 ft
Wind: 10 kt headwind
ROC (all engines): 1830 ft/min
ROC (single engine): 400 ft/min
TAS: 101 kt
